# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

- 200
          request_method:
            - GET
          content_type:
            - "application/json; charset=utf-8"
          cache_ttl: 60
          strategy: memory
          memory:
            dictionary_name: kong_db_cache

  # ==========================================
  # Order Service
  # ==========================================
  - name: order-service
    url: http://order-service-upstream:8002
    protocol: http
    connect_timeout: 10000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    retries: 2
    routes:
      - name: orders-list-create
        paths:
          - /api/v1/orders
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        https_redirect_status_code: 301

      - name: orders-by-id
        paths:
          - /api/v1/orders/(?<order_id>[a-f0-9\-]+)$
        methods:
          - GET
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 100

      - name: orders-status
        paths:
          - /api/v1/orders/(?<order_id>[a-f0-9\-]+)/status$
        methods:
          - GET
          - PUT
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 200

      - name: orders-history
        paths:
          - /api/v1/orders/history
        methods:
          - GET
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 300

      - name: orders-checkout
        paths:
          - /api/v1/orders/checkout
        methods:
          - POST
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 300
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 30
              hour: 200
              policy: redis
              redis_host: redis-cluster
              redis_port: 6379
              redis_database: 0
              fault_tolerant: true
          - name: request-termination
            enabled: false
            config:
              status_code: 503
              message: "Checkout is temporarily unavailable for maintenance."

      - name: orders-admin
        paths:
          - /api/v1/admin/orders
        methods:
          - GET
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        plugins:
          - name: acl
            config:
              allow:
                - admin-group
                - order-manager-group
              hide_groups_header: true

    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key_names:
            - X-API-Key
          key_in_query: false
          key_in_header: true
          hide_credentials: true
      - name: jwt
        config:
          header_names:
            - Authorization
          claims_to_verify:
            - exp
          key_claim_name: iss
          run_on_preflight: false
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 200
          hour: 5000
          policy: redis
          redis_host: redis-cluster
          redis_port: 6379
          redis_database: 0
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
      - name: correlation-id
        config:
          header_name: X-Request-ID
          generator: uuid#counter
          echo_downstream: true
      - name: request-size-limiting
        config:
          allowed_payload_size: 10
          size_unit: megabytes
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - "X-Forwarded-Service:order-service"

  # ==========================================
  # Product Service
  # ==========================================
  - name: product-service
    url: http://product-service-upstream:8003
    protocol: http
    connect_timeout: 10000
    write_timeout: 30000
    read_timeout: 30000
    retries: 3
    routes:
      - name: products-list
        paths:
          - /api/v1/products
        methods:
          - GET
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        https_redirect_status_code: 301
        plugins:
          - name: proxy-cache
            config:
              response_code:
                - 200
              request_method:
                - GET
              content_type:
                - "application/json; charset=utf-8"
              cache_ttl: 300
              strategy: memory
              memory:
                dictionary_name: kong_db_cache

      - name: products-by-id
        paths:
          - /api/v1/products/(?<product_id>[a-f0-9\-]+)$
        methods:
          - GET
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 100
        plugins:
          - name: proxy-cache
            config:
              response_code:
                - 200
              request_method:
                - GET
              content_type:
                - "application/json; charset=utf-8"
              cache_ttl: 120
              strategy: memory
              memory:
                dictionary_name: kong_db_cache

      - name: products-search
        paths:
          - /api/v1/products/search
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 200

      - name: products-categories
        paths:
          - /api/v1/products/categories
        methods:
          - GET
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 200
        plugins:
          - name: proxy-cache
            config:
              response_code:
                - 200
              request_method:
                - GET
              content_type:
                - "application/json; charset=utf-8"
              cache_ttl: 600
              strategy: memory
              memory:
                dictionary_name: kong_db_cache

      - name: products-reviews
        paths:
          - /api/v1/products/(?<product_id>[a-f0-9\-]+)/reviews$
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 200

      - name: products-admin
        paths:
          - /api/v1/admin/products
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        plugins:
          - name: acl
            config:
              allow:
                - admin-group
                - product-manager-group
              hide_groups_header: true

    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key_names:
            - X-API-Key
          key_in_query: false
          key_in_header: true
          hide_credentials: true
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 500
          hour: 20000
          policy: redis
          redis_host: redis-cluster
          redis_port: 6379
          redis_database: 0
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
      - name: correlation-id
        config:
          header_name: X-Request-ID
          generator: uuid#counter
          echo_downstream: true
      - name: request-size-limiting
        config:
          allowed_payload_size: 5
          size_unit: megabytes
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - "X-Forwarded-Service:product-service"

  # ==========================================
  # Notification Service
  # ==========================================
  - name: notification-service
    url: http://notification-service-upstream:8005
    protocol: http
    connect_timeout: 5000
    write_timeout: 15000
    read_timeout: 15000
    retries: 2
    routes:
      - name: notifications-list
        paths:
          - /api/v1/notifications
        methods:
          - GET
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true

      - name: notifications-preferences
        paths:
          - /api/v1/notifications/preferences
        methods:
          - GET
          - PUT
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 200

      - name: notifications-mark-read
        paths:
          - /api/v1/notifications/(?<notification_id>[a-f0-9\-]+)/read$
        methods:
          - PUT
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        regex_priority: 100

      - name: notifications-admin-send
        paths:
          - /api/v1/admin/notifications/send
        methods:
          - POST
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        plugins:
          - name: acl
            config:
              allow:
                - admin-group
              hide_groups_header: true
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 50
              hour: 500
              policy: redis
              redis_host: redis-cluster
              redis_port: 6379
              redis_database: 0
              fault_tolerant: true

    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key_names:
            - X-API-Key
          key_in_query: false
          key_in_header: true
          hide_credentials: true
      - name: jwt
        config:
          header_names:
            - Authorization
          claims_to_verify:
            - exp
          key_claim_name: iss
          run_on_preflight: false
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 200
          hour: 5000
          policy: redis
          redis_host: redis-cluster
          redis_port: 6379
          redis_database: 0
          fault_tolerant: true
      - name: correlation-id
        config:
          header_name: X-Request-ID
          generator: uuid#counter
          echo_downstream: true
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - "X-Forwarded-Service:notification-service"

  # ==========================================
  # Health Check Endpoint (Public)
  # ==========================================
  - name: health-check-service
    url: http://localhost:8001/status
    protocol: http
    connect_timeout: 3000
    write_timeout: 3000
    read_timeout: 3000
    retries: 1
    routes:
      - name: gateway-health
        paths:
          - /health
          - /api/health
        methods:
          - GET
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        strip_path: true
        preserve_host: false
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 60
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
      - name: request-termination
        config:
          status_code: 200
          content_type: "application/json"
          body: '{"status":"healthy","service":"api-gateway","timestamp":"dynamic"}'

# Global Plugins (applied to all services)
plugins:
  # Bot Detection
  - name: bot-detection
    enabled: true
    config:
      deny:
        - "Scrapy"
        - "SemrushBot"

  # CORS Configuration
  - name: cors
    enabled: true
    config:
      origins:
        - "https://app.example.com"
        - "https://admin.example.com"
        - "https://partner.example.com"
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - PATCH
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
        - HEAD
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Accept-Version
        - Authorization
        - Content-Length
        - Content-Type
        - X-API-Key
        - X-Request-ID
        - X-Requested-With
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Request-ID
        - X-RateLimit-Limit-Minute
        - X-RateLimit-Remaining-Minute
        - X-RateLimit-Limit-Hour
        - X-RateLimit-Remaining-Hour
        - X-Kong-Upstream-Latency
        - X-Kong-Proxy-Latency
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
      preflight_continue: false

  # IP Restriction (Global blocklist)
  - name: ip-restriction
    enabled: true
    config:
      deny:
        - 192.168.1.100
      status: 403
      message: "Your IP address is not allowed."

  # Response Transformer - Security Headers
  - name: response-transformer
    enabled: true
    config:
      add:
        headers:
          - "X-Content-Type-Options:nosniff"
          - "X-Frame-Options:DENY"
          - "X-XSS-Protection:1; mode=block"
          - "Strict-Transport-Security:max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload"
          - "Referrer-Policy:strict-origin-when-cross-origin"
          - "Content-Security-Policy:default-src 'self'"
          - "Permissions-Policy:camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()"
      remove:
        headers:
          - "Server"
          - "X-Powered-By"
          - "Via"

  # TCP Log - Send logs to external logging service
  - name: tcp-log
    enabled: true
    config:
      host: logstash.internal.example.com
      port: 5044
      timeout: 10000
      keepalive: 60000
      tls: true

  # HTTP Log - Send logs to centralized logging
  - name: http-log
    enabled: true
    config:
      http_endpoint: https://logs.internal.example.com/kong
      method: POST
      timeout: 10000
      keepalive: 60000
      content_type: "application/json"
      retry_count: 3
      flush_timeout: 2
      queue_size: 1000
      headers:
        Authorization: "Bearer logging-service-token-2024"

  # Prometheus Metrics
  - name: prometheus
    enabled: true
    config:
      per_consumer: true
      status_code_metrics: true
      latency_metrics: true
      bandwidth_metrics: true
      upstream_health_metrics: true

  # Request Termination for blocked paths
  - name: request-termination
    enabled: false
    config:
      status_code: 403
      message: "This endpoint is currently disabled."

  # Global Rate Limiting (fallback)
  - name: rate-limiting
    enabled: true
    config:
      second: 50
      minute: 2000
      hour: 50000
      policy: redis
      redis_host: redis-cluster
      redis_port: 6379
      redis_database: 2
      fault_tolerant: true
      hide_client_headers: false
      error_code: 429
      error_message: "API rate limit exceeded. Please slow down your requests."
